subcodes.first_line: Say: O God, O Thou Who sendeth down the verses and manifesteth the clear signs! I beseech Thee by the Dawning-Place of Thy knowledge and the Day-Spring of Thy Revelation and the Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا منزل الایات و مظهر البینات اسئلک بمطلع علمک و مشرق وحیک و مظهر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
